item.title: LogicGrid 10.0.0
item.description:
LogicGrid 10.0.0

Major release. Subdivisions rewritten, modes rebalanced, polish across the board.

New

  • Subdivision rendering rewritten with mathematical placement + tick snapping
  • "Show subdivisions up to" cascade: bars / beats / 8ths / 16ths
  • "Fully zoomed" setting controls tick density when bars aren't visible
  • Spotlight Circle has a feathered edge, adjustable in Settings
  • Working-state visual — grid dims smoothly while scanning or refining
  • Welcome window resizes to fit any screen
  • Troubleshooting menu item

Changed

  • Scrub Mode now runs alongside the grid instead of replacing it
  • "Always On" renamed to "Full Grid"
  • Mode cycle: Spotlight Vertical → Spotlight Circle → Selected Tracks + Regions → Full Grid
  • Grid + scrub line hide while Welcome or Settings are open, or when Logic loses focus

Shortcuts

  • ⌃⌥J — mute / unmute (was: cycle modes)
  • ⌃⌥K — cycle modes (was: mute)
  • ⌃⌥; — toggle Scrub Mode
  • ⌃⌥' — cycle subdivision detail (new)

Fixed

  • Drawing accuracy at extreme zoom levels
  • Phantom bar lines at extreme zoom
  • Welcome window text no longer shrinks when clicked
